creator: glewis@eyesbeyond.com
text:
On Fri, Jan 15, 2010 at 12:28:21AM -0800, Rob Farmer wrote:
> > I don't recall seeing any other reports of problems building this port.
> > Can you please provide the actual build failure you're seeing? ?AFAIK
> > FreeBSD 9 uses the same version of gcc as on FreeBSD 8 and these patches
> > aren't required there.
> 
> I can get you a fresh log from the machine in question tomorrow if you
> like, but the jdk ports are failing on pointyhat:
> 
> http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/i386-errorlogs/e.9.20100107122952/jdk-1.6.0.3p4_13.log
> http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/i386-errorlogs/e.9.20100105162846/jdk-1.5.0.16p9_4,1.log

Thanks Rob!  I didn't realise it was failing on pointyhat.  I'll take a
look over those logs and your patches, no need for a log from your
machine.

--
